## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly knowledge share between AirOps and GrowthX Labs to strengthen partnership and maximize platform benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps introduced new image-related features: hero images, open graph images, and interspersed article images](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [New "Read from Grid" step allows filtering and fetching data from grids within workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Custom variables in brand kits enable more flexible and specific content creation](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs provided feedback on permissioning, workflow optimization, and training needs](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)

## Topics

### New Image Features

  - [Three new image templates: hero images, open graph images, and interspersed article images](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Uses Getty (premium) and Unsplash (budget-friendly) APIs for image sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Human review step for image selection, with multi-select option for interspersed images](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Open graph images use brand colors and logos fetched via BrandFetch API](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### Read from Grid Feature

  - [New step allowing filtering and reading data from grids within workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Useful for fact-checking, content optimization, and dynamic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Enables more complex workflows and data-driven content generation](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

### Custom Variables in Brand Kits

  - [Allows creation of specific variables beyond standard brand kit fields](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Enables more tailored content creation for different content types (e.g., listicles)](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
  - [Improves workflow customization and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2124.0)

### Q4 Product Roadmap

  - [Focus on improving output quality and reducing time to value](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Planned improvements to Studio UX, workspace organization, and quality evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)
  - [Investing in AI features like co-pilot for workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)

### User Feedback and Requests

  - [Need for more granular permissioning and access control](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Desire for infographic creation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Interest in YouTube video embedding within articles](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Request for lead capture functionality similar to chatbase.co](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Need for best practices in prompt engineering and model selection](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate infographic creation capabilities and video embedding options](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2942.0)
  - [Develop more granular permissioning and access control features](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Create resources on best practices for prompt engineering and model selection](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=3066.0)
  - [Explore lead capture functionality integration](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Develop suggestions for reducing token consumption in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
  - [Continue to gather user feedback and prioritize feature requests](https://fathom.video/share/PyGcH3N_mc5EojmMc1DkATmWiEjfm7js?tab=summary&timestamp=3331.0)
